ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the market capitalization */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the company's CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume traded */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Turnover (total value of shares traded) */,
  "transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous closing price */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_diffs" (
  "diff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price difference record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily price record */,
  "price_diff" REAL /* Difference between the closing price and the previous closing price */,
  "price_range" REAL /* Difference between the highest and lowest prices */,
  "diff_percent" REAL /* Percentage difference between the closing price and the previous closing price */,
  "range_percent" REAL /* Percentage difference between the highest and lowest prices */,
  "vwap_percent" REAL /* Percentage difference between the VWAP and the closing price */,
  "price_diff_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the price difference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "hist_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume traded */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Turnover (total value of shares traded) */,
  "transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hist_price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being watched */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was removed from the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being monitored */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
